name: FOSTER ELECTRICAL SERVICE & REPAIR - Electrician in Chattanooga TN
notes: Issues: very few internal pages (1 — thin site); no contact form found; no SSL (HTTP only). Rating: NEEDS_WORK (score 62)

review_snippets.name: Sarah P.
review_snippets.text: We bought a fixer-upper and Foster has been vital in making it safe and functional. From the big overhaul of a new breaker box and outdoor power hookup to smaller updates like GFCI outlets and light fixtures, they’ve done a great job! Reasonable prices, speedy service, and most i

review_snippets.name: Karen F.
review_snippets.text:
The team was polite, professional, prompt, thorough and taught me a lot! Foster Electric Company has wonderful staff from making appointments to project management to work done. I appreciate everyone there.
Thank you for the services you provide!

review_snippets.name: Rick G.
review_snippets.text:
Foster Electric is now my “go to” company for my home electrical needs and advice.
Zach Scott was prompt, professional, and most of all knowledgeable. And he worked fast, always explaining  what and why he was doing what needed to be done.

Rick G.
February 2021

review_snippets.name: Jessica S.
review_snippets.text: Jason and Rocco were friendly and efficient when they came and installed an outlet for our dryer. They communicated different strategies for the install, and picked with us, the best one. I would have them work on my house again.

review_snippets.name: amber r.
review_snippets.text: Aaron was great!  Fixed the light and figured out a light switch.  Very reasonable cost.
